summary: George Russell carries momentum into his Silverstone homecoming as Mercedes hunts consecutive victories against a resurgent Red Bull outfit determined to reassert dominance. McLaren's pace surge and Ferrari's consistency threaten to splinter the top three, demanding flawless execution from all contenders navigating the high-speed British circuit. A win here would cement Russell's credentials as a championship force while signaling whether Mercedes has finally closed the gap to Max Verstappen's championship lead.
